title: Inflatable Paddleboard
bullets: Inflatable but solid and durable once inflated
Large and stable enough for 2-3 people/dogs - fits a chair
Easy to transport rolled-up in bag

title: Electric Pump for paddleboards
bullets: Inflates my paddleboard in a few minutes, easier than the manual pump
Battery lasts for multiple inflations/deflations, USB-C rechargeable
